decisions.relationship_evidence: Proves a general threshold theorem linking the basic reproduction number to globally stable endemic versus disease-free equilibria in compartmental epidemic models.
decisions.lineage_evidence: The record introduces and proves a new general reproduction-number threshold result.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Describes developing and establishing a sentinel syndromic surveillance system that identified five outbreaks in Madagascar.
decisions.lineage_evidence: This is a development report for a concrete sentinel outbreak-detection system.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses sentinel surveillance to monitor influenza circulation, but does not explicitly use it for outbreak detection or forecasting.
decisions.lineage_evidence: The record is not a lineage lead for the exact outbreak-detection and forecasting concept.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses sentinel-network data retrospectively to describe influenza spread and epidemic peaks, without an explicit outbreak-detection or forecasting method.
decisions.lineage_evidence: This descriptive surveillance analysis is not a lead for the exact concept.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Assesses airport sentinel fever screening for early dengue detection, including sensitivity, predictive values, lead time, and limitations.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicitly evaluates the performance and limitations of a sentinel early-detection procedure.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses an equine surveillance network and a predictive decision tree for early clinical detection before epidemic activity in humans.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete West Nile fever application of sentinel early detection.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Provides a web-based sentinel malaria early-warning system with epidemic thresholds, automated alerts, and a forecasting component.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit operational implementation of sentinel outbreak detection and forecasting.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Implements rapid sentinel testing at urgent-care sites to detect and confirm community SARS-CoV-2 transmission.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete COVID-19 sentinel-detection application that informed mitigation measures.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Describes fever clinics acting as sentinel sites for early identification and isolation of suspected COVID-19 cases.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicitly shares a sentinel screening roadmap and strategies for early detection.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops and validates an AI-based sentinel system that predicts dialysis-clinic COVID-19 outbreaks over a two-week horizon.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Provides an implemented outbreak-prediction tool with validation results.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Evaluates modified influenza sentinel surveillance for COVID-19 monitoring and reports component-specific yield and low-activity sensitivity limitations.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit performance assessment of sentinel surveillance during a pandemic wave.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Analyzes respiratory-virus trends from a sentinel database but does not explicitly apply sentinel outbreak detection or forecasting.
decisions.lineage_evidence: The record is an epidemiological analysis rather than a lineage lead for the exact concept.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops prefecture-specific case-per-sentinel thresholds for early detection of the start of RSV epidemic seasons.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Introduces a threshold-based sentinel early-detection approach.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Evaluates eleven years of sentinel-hospital cluster detection and finds that none of 464 detected clusters triggered an emergency response.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Directly assesses practical utility and identifies ways to improve sentinel cluster detection.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses a low-cost hospital surveillance strategy to identify respiratory-disease clusters and support rapid outbreak detection.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete hospital respiratory-outbreak surveillance application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Presents an implemented open-source framework that runs configurable statistical algorithms and sends outbreak-signal notifications.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit software implementation for computer-supported outbreak detection.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Compares practical use of computer-supported outbreak-detection systems across six institutes and documents limitations and recommendations.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit multi-site assessment of operational limitations and usability.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Establishes and weights a new early-warning indicator system for hemorrhagic fever outbreaks using Delphi consultation.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological development of an outbreak early-warning index.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Establishes a graded surveillance and early-warning index system and associated schistosomiasis risk-assessment methods.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Introduces a structured surveillance warning and risk-assessment method.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Directly discusses complexities and pitfalls of current surveillance and proposes directions for improving early outbreak-detection systems.
decisions.lineage_evidence: A methodological vision offering explicit guidance for future early-detection systems.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Reports implementation of HIV drug-resistance early-warning indicator monitoring across Caribbean countries.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete multi-country infectious-disease early-warning monitoring application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Monitors five HIV drug-resistance early-warning indicators at Vietnamese treatment clinics to guide public-health action.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete application of early-warning indicator surveillance.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops a web-based MDRO surveillance system with automated classification, clustering, control charts, and outbreak detection.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Implemented and empirically evaluated outbreak-detection system.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Describes implementing two real-time laboratory surveillance systems that detected abnormal bacterial and resistance events.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit operational laboratory-surveillance implementation.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Assesses the effectiveness, cost, appropriateness, and sustainability of a national media-based outbreak-detection system.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit evaluation of an operational early-detection system.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Describes the design, implementation, and routine institutional use of an automated statistical outbreak-detection system.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Provides a deployed automated outbreak-detection implementation.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Proposes, develops, validates, and tests a surveillance mechanism for detecting infection-related glucose elevations from self-recorded data.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Provides an implemented and validated early infectious-disease detection mechanism.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Evaluates whether social-media posts and search behavior detect MRSA outbreaks earlier than official notifications and documents missed and additional outbreaks.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Direct comparative performance assessment of alternative early-warning signals.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops, implements, and empirically evaluates a Twitter framework for real-time avian-influenza outbreak detection.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit digital outbreak-warning implementation with validation against official reports.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Implements the DOT crowdsourcing application and an EARS-based real-time outbreak surveillance and detection system.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Provides concrete mobile and analytical surveillance implementations.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Evaluates targeted wastewater surveillance for campus outbreak detection and compares wastewater signals with individual testing and case trends.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit efficacy assessment of wastewater outbreak surveillance.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Describes the events that created Sentinel and its design for rapid pathogen detection, real-time information sharing, and pandemic response.
decisions.lineage_evidence: An explicit origin and design account for a named pandemic early-warning system.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses RT-PCR quantification-cycle distributions and ARIMA analysis to improve short-term epidemic predictions for surveillance.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete COVID-19 predictive-surveillance application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses sewage surveillance to track long-term epidemic circulation in near real time but does not explicitly provide early warning or outbreak detection.
decisions.lineage_evidence: The record is not a lineage lead for the exact early-warning concept.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Designs a proof-of-concept study to test whether wastewater sentinel surveillance enables early outbreak detection and correlates with clinical data.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit evaluation of a proposed sentinel early-detection system.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Introduces a near-real-time behavioral contact-data approach for estimating reproduction numbers and signaling failures in official monitoring.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Presents an explicitly innovative surveillance-signaling approach.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Systematically reviews the effectiveness and lead time of environmental SARS-CoV-2 surveillance as an early-warning system.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit evidence synthesis evaluating early-warning performance and limitations.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops wastewater-based reproduction-number and scenario models, but the abstract does not explicitly frame them as outbreak detection or early warning.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Not a lineage lead for the exact surveillance early-warning concept.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Estimates reproduction numbers using wastewater and clinical data but does not explicitly implement or evaluate an early-warning or outbreak-detection system.
decisions.lineage_evidence: The exact early-warning relationship is unsupported.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Proposes estimation of transmission dynamics from wastewater data without explicitly supporting outbreak detection or early warning.
decisions.lineage_evidence: The record concerns transmission inference rather than the exact assigned concept.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Directly assesses reproduction-number alarms against the existing MASS epidemic alarm and quantifies earlier detection.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit comparative evaluation of an early-warning indicator.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses the EPIWATCH AI early-warning system to monitor infectious-disease patterns during disruption of formal surveillance in Ukraine.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete wartime application of an infectious-disease early-warning system.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Evaluates whether cycle-threshold trends precede case surges and can serve as early indicators for epidemic monitoring.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit assessment of a proposed early-warning signal.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Retrospectively benchmarks three sentinel-allocation strategies against random surveillance for detecting foot-and-mouth disease outbreaks.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Direct comparative performance evaluation of sentinel outbreak-detection strategies.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops and tests a dual-threshold traveler-surveillance method for timely detection of elevated dengue transmission risk.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Introduces a new threshold-based surveillance detection approach.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses hospital wastewater surveillance to rapidly detect toxigenic Vibrio cholerae and trigger an immediate traceback investigation.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete early-warning application that produced a public-health response.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Shows wastewater isolates appearing 7–14 days before a Salmonella outbreak and evaluates their value as an early-warning signal.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit assessment of wastewater surveillance lead time and linkage to an outbreak.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Reports real-world implementation and validation of ÆSOP anomaly-detection warnings for respiratory outbreaks, including sensitivity and specificity.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Operational early-warning implementation with authority-validated performance.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops a two-stage time-trend model and predictive-inference approach for forecasting Lassa fever case patterns.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit development of a time-series forecasting model.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops, selects, calibrates, and validates a modified ARIMA model for weekly dengue-incidence forecasting.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit development of a tailored time-series forecasting approach.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops a retrospective transmission-risk calculation for air travel, not a transmission-dynamics forecasting model.
decisions.lineage_evidence: The exact combined dynamics-and-forecasting concept is unsupported.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Fits GAM, catalytic, TSIR, and generalized linear models to infer RSV transmission and assess climate-linked future burden.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete infectious-disease application of transmission-dynamics models.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Compares contact-data collection methods that may inform transmission models, but does not itself apply or evaluate a transmission-dynamics forecasting model.
decisions.lineage_evidence: The evaluated concept is contact measurement, not the assigned modeling concept.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops probabilistic branching-process models and a reusable framework for nowcasting pathogen introduction and spread.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Introduces an outbreak-spread nowcasting framework.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses a metapopulation transmission model to infer infections and forecast domestic and international 2019-nCoV spread under interventions.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete epidemic nowcasting and forecasting application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops subexponential, exponential, and probabilistic models to nowcast epidemic transition and secondary-infection risk.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicitly develops a city-level epidemic nowcasting approach.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Trains a mathematical transmission model on historical influenza activity and uses it to reconstruct incidence and forecast the 2023 season.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete seasonal-influenza nowcasting and forecasting application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops a method for constructing plausible transmission trees and quantifying transmission direction and magnitude during an outbreak.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Introduces a framework for outbreak transmission inference.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Presents likelihood-based methods that reconstruct outbreak transmission while accounting for missing and erroneous transmission events.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological introduction of robust outbreak reconstruction.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses a Bayesian inferential framework to estimate setting-specific influenza generation intervals despite missing links and onset times.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete influenza transmission-parameter inference application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Proposes new serology-based methods for inferring transmission-route heterogeneity and epidemiological parameters.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicitly introduces and develops new transmission-inference methods.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Estimates clinical outcomes, incubation periods, and exposure timing but does not infer transmission dynamics or transmission links.
decisions.lineage_evidence: The record is not a lineage lead for transmission-dynamics inference.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses paired social-contact data and incidence comparisons to infer reproduction-number changes and symptomatic versus asymptomatic transmission contributions.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete influenza transmission-inference application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Maps Ebola transmission chains, estimates context-specific reproduction numbers, and simulates intervention effects.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete Ebola outbreak transmission-inference analysis.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Validates Internet news reports against traditional surveillance for estimating Ebola exposure patterns, reproduction number, and fatality.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit validation of an alternative data source for transmission inference.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops a statistical framework for inferring reservoir, cluster, regional, and heterogeneous MERS-CoV transmission from uncertain links.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Introduces a general transmission-inference approach for limited and uncertain linkage data.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses case line lists, inferred networks, reproduction numbers, and regression to identify Ebola transmission drivers.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete retrospective Ebola transmission-inference application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops a nonlinear distributed-lag time-series approach for inferring determinants of seasonal rotavirus transmission.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological development for transmission-driver inference.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Applies branching-process likelihood models to infer genotype-specific measles reproduction numbers.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete measles transmission-inference application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Estimates and compares reproduction numbers across two chikungunya epidemic waves in a prospective cohort.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete chikungunya transmission-intensity inference.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Reconstructs time-varying cholera transmission with instantaneous reproduction numbers and a spatiotemporal rainfall model.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete cholera transmission-dynamics inference from surveillance data.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Constructs and parameterizes a coinfection model to infer how individual effects produce population-level transmission patterns.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete data-driven pathogen transmission modeling application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Applies the generalized-growth method to infer the effective reproduction number during a Zika epidemic.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete Zika transmission-parameter inference.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses field and incidence data in mathematical models to estimate vectorial transmission metrics and basic reproduction numbers.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete Plasmodium vivax transmission-inference application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses fourteen years of outbreak investigations to infer person-to-person Nipah transmission, reproduction numbers, and exposure-related risk.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete Nipah transmission-dynamics inference.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Estimates municipal chikungunya reproduction numbers and relates them to environmental and outbreak characteristics.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete cross-municipality transmission inference.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Fits four epidemic growth models to surveillance data to estimate Lassa fever reproduction numbers and rainfall effects.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete Lassa fever transmission-dynamics inference.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Estimates the basic reproduction number and interprets the potential for sustained early human-to-human 2019-nCoV transmission.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete early-outbreak transmission inference.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Estimates generation intervals and demonstrates that reproduction numbers based on serial intervals can be biased.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Directly diagnoses bias and data requirements in transmission-parameter inference.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Estimates regional effective reproduction numbers to describe COVID-19 transmission dynamics alongside clinical outcomes.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete regional COVID-19 transmission inference.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses a model with changing ascertainment, transmission, infectiousness, and movement to reconstruct Wuhan's full COVID-19 dynamics.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete full-outbreak transmission reconstruction.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Estimates basic and effective reproduction numbers for 7,094 norovirus outbreaks and assesses setting-specific variation.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Large-scale norovirus transmission-inference application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses historical epidemic records to infer changing plague growth rates and constrain plausible transmission modes.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete historical transmission-dynamics inference.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Maps COVID-19 transmission chains from patient histories and contact links and identifies superspreading.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete outbreak transmission-chain inference.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses statistical and dynamic models to estimate lineage-specific transmissibility and project epidemic resurgence.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete SARS-CoV-2 variant transmission-inference application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Estimates SARS-CoV-2 serial intervals from 583 identified transmission pairs and evaluates temporal variation.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete transmission-interval inference.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Fits epidemic growth curves to infer national reproduction numbers and models their social and environmental determinants.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete cross-country transmission inference.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Combines Bayesian models with parasitological, molecular, and epidemiological data to infer multihost schistosome transmission and spillover.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete zoonotic and hybrid transmission-dynamics inference.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses epidemic and ARIMA models to estimate reproduction-related dynamics and forecast cases across countries.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete cross-country COVID-19 modeling application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses a mathematical model to infer within- and between-class transmission patterns and intervention associations from influenza outbreaks.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete school influenza transmission-inference application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Reports attack rates and adjusted breakthrough-infection risks but does not explicitly infer transmission dynamics or transmission links.
decisions.lineage_evidence: The record is not a lineage lead for the exact concept.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses the Wallinga-Teunis method to infer time-varying and individual reproduction numbers for staff and residents.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete long-term-care SARS-CoV-2 transmission inference.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Combines phylogenetic analysis, transmission modeling, reproduction-number estimation, and simulations to characterize recruit outbreaks.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete congregate-setting SARS-CoV-2 transmission analysis.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Fits a negative-binomial branching process to cluster-size data to jointly infer tuberculosis reproduction and dispersion parameters.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Systematic multi-setting application of transmission-parameter inference.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Applies consistent phylodynamic methods across MRSA lineages to infer reproduction-number changes and epidemic-growth signatures.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete multi-lineage bacterial transmission inference.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Fits a mobility-parameterized transmission model to cases and polling data to infer Rt, incidence, and attack rates.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete Omicron transmission-dynamics inference.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Applies a branching-process model to contact-tracing data to estimate reproduction, dispersion, variant transmissibility, and vaccine effects.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete SARS-CoV-2 transmission-parameter inference.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses a Bayesian framework and compatible transmission trees to infer household serial intervals by SARS-CoV-2 variant.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete household transmission reconstruction and interval inference.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses Susceptible-Infectious-Removed models with experimental transmission data to estimate R0 and transmission rates.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete experimental African swine fever transmission inference.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses spatiotemporal case clusters to infer mpox effective reproduction numbers and zoonotic spillover rates.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete mpox transmission and spillover inference from surveillance data.
